narrative.headline: What 2016 Ram 1500 owners report most
narrative.summary: Steering complaints are the most-reported concern for this model year, followed closely by engine and brake issues, with powertrain problems also appearing frequently. Owners describe a range of sudden, in-motion failures — from loss of acceleration and brake pedals traveling to the floorboard, to violent shaking and noise while driving. Several categories include reports associated with fires or crashes, indicating that a meaningful share of incidents involved serious safety consequences.

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report an intermittent popping noise occurring behind the dashboard near the steering column when turning the steering wheel left or right. · 1 fire · 6 crash · 3 injured

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2016 RAM 1500. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 30 MPH, THE VEHICLE LOST ACCELERATION. THE CONTACT COASTED TO THE SIDE OF THE ROAD TO A COMPLETE STOP. AFTER WAITING APPROXIMATELY ONE MINUTE, THE CONTACT RESTARTED THE VEHICLE AND DROVE TO AN INDEPENDENT MECHANIC.
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report sudden loss of acceleration while driving, requiring the vehicle to coast to a stop before normal operation could resume. · 24 fire · 2 crash · 7 injured

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report the brake pedal traveling all the way to the floorboard during braking, with at least one case attributed to a failed rear brake line. · 2 fire · 10 crash

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle shaking violently without warning while underway, in some cases traced to bolts securing the driveshaft to the differential coming loose. · 5 fire · 34 crash · 15 injured
